goals.title: snapshot page: remove lower header chips and all live-related indicat...
goals.objective: snapshot page: remove lower header chips and all live-related indicators while keeping date visible

criteria.scenario: Happy path works from the real user-facing surface.
criteria.notes: Browser captures verify the header has no chip group, keeps the date as plain text, and shows no live indicators.

criteria.scenario: Riskiest edge or failure path is handled.
criteria.notes: Focused snapshot tests, lint, TypeScript build, and production build pass after the date is plain header text and live indicators are removed.
command: pnpm vitest run src/features/daily/snapshot/snapshot-output.test.ts; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm lint; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm exec tsc -b; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm build; exit $LASTEXITCODE

goals.evidence: Snapshot header chips reduced to date-only and snapshot live indicators removed, with browser visual QA and validation command evidence.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: Snapshot header chips reduced to date-only and snapshot live indicators removed, with browser visual QA and validation command evidence.
